member.name: T:Propertify.Mobile.Services.ApiService
member.summary: HTTP client wrapper for the Propertify mobile REST API. All methods return default/empty values on network or deserialisation failure so the UI stays stable without crashing.

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.Services.ApiService.LoginAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Sends credentials to POST api/mobile/login and returns the server response.

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.Services.ApiService.GetDashboardAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Fetches the aggregated dashboard data for . Returns null on failure.

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.Services.ApiService.GetContractsAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns the list of contracts for , or an empty list on failure.

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.Services.ApiService.GetInvoicesAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns all utility bills for , or an empty list on failure.

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.Services.ApiService.GetMaintenanceAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Returns all maintenance requests for , or an empty list on failure.

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.Services.ApiService.SubmitMaintenanceAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32,System.String,Microsoft.Maui.Storage.FileResult)
member.summary: Posts a new maintenance request as a multipart form. Attaches the optional as a binary stream. Returns true if the server responded with a success status code.

member.name: T:Propertify.Mobile.Services.SessionService
member.summary: In-memory session store for the currently logged-in tenant. Registered as a singleton so any page or ViewModel can inject it to read the active identity.

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.Services.SessionService.SetSession(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Populates all session fields after a successful login response.

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.Services.SessionService.Clear
member.summary: Resets all session fields to their default values (logout).

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.Services.SessionService.HasPermission(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if appears in the permissions list, or if the list is empty (all-access).

member.name: F:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.ContractsViewModel.refreshCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.ContractsViewModel.RefreshCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.DashboardViewModel.refreshCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.DashboardViewModel.RefreshCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.InvoicesViewModel.refreshCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.InvoicesViewModel.RefreshCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: M:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.LoginViewModel.OnIsPasswordVisibleChanged(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Executes the logic for when just changed.
member.param: The new property value that was set.
member.remarks: This method is invoked right after the value of is changed.

member.name: F:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.LoginViewModel.togglePasswordVisibilityCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.LoginViewModel.TogglePasswordVisibilityCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.LoginViewModel.loginCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.LoginViewModel.LoginCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: F:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.MaintenanceViewModel.refreshCommand
member.summary: The backing field for .

member.name: P:Propertify.Mobile.ViewModels.MaintenanceViewModel.RefreshCommand
member.summary: Gets an instance wrapping .

member.name: T:Propertify.Mobile.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.

member.name: T:CommunityToolkit.Mvvm.ComponentModel.__Internals.__KnownINotifyPropertyChangingArgs
member.summary: A helper type providing cached, reusable instances for all properties generated with .
